pdg_node.informal_desc: Scale the prediction signal into a normalized score space used by downstream peak detection.

declaration.name: normalizepredictionforpeakscoring
declaration.docstring: Scale the prediction signal into a normalized score space used by downstream peak detection.

declaration.name: normalizepredictionforpeakscoring
declaration.docstring: Scale the prediction signal into a normalized score space used by downstream peak detection.

declaration.name: normalizepredictionforpeakscoring
declaration.docstring: Scale the prediction signal into a normalized score space used by downstream peak detection.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Scan normalized scores left-to-right, trigger on threshold crossings, and select one candidate index per window using raw-signal tie-breaking when multiple maxima occur.

declaration.name: detectcandidatepeakswithadaptivewindows
declaration.docstring: Scan normalized scores left-to-right, trigger on threshold crossings, and select one candidate index per window using raw-signal tie-breaking when multiple maxima occur.

declaration.name: detectcandidatepeakswithadaptivewindows
declaration.docstring: Scan normalized scores left-to-right, trigger on threshold crossings, and select one candidate index per window using raw-signal tie-breaking when multiple maxima occur.

declaration.docstring: Scan normalized scores left-to-right, trigger on threshold crossings, and select one candidate index per window using raw-signal tie-breaking when multiple maxima occur.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Resolve neighboring candidate peaks that are too close by greedily keeping the one with higher raw-signal amplitude.

declaration.name: suppresspeakscloserthanminimumdistance
declaration.docstring: Resolve neighboring candidate peaks that are too close by greedily keeping the one with higher raw-signal amplitude.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Remove peaks whose raw-signal amplitude is non-positive and return the remaining indices as a numpy array.

declaration.name: filternonpositivepeaksandfinalize
declaration.docstring: Remove peaks whose raw-signal amplitude is non-positive and return the remaining indices as a numpy array.

pdg_node.statement: (arr: array-like numeric values) -> array-like numeric values
pdg_node.informal_desc: Pure stateless normalization of an input numeric array.

declaration.name: signalarraynormalization
declaration.type_signature: (arr: array-like numeric values) -> array-like numeric values
declaration.docstring: Pure stateless normalization of an input numeric array.
declaration.conceptual_summary: DeterministicNumericArrayRescaling. Transforms a finite numeric array by applying a deterministic scaling rule parameterized by summary statistics of that same array (for example, magnitude, extrema, or dispersion). The mapping preserves the original shape while converting values to a standardized scale so comparisons are less sensitive to absolute magnitude. This is a one-pass, stateless canonicalization step used to make downstream computations scale-consistent.. Applications: Preconditioning multichannel instrument readings in autonomous systems before sensor fusion, Standardizing voxel/intensity arrays in volumetric imaging pipelines prior to segmentation or registration, Normalizing high-throughput molecular measurement vectors before clustering or manifold learning, Rescaling node or edge feature vectors in graph-based infrastructure simulations before optimization
